name: Catalogizer Fixes Validation Suite
description: Regression tests ensuring all discovered and fixed bugs never recur. Each entry maps to a specific bug fix with evidence.

test_cases.name: Provider routing challenge whitespace tolerance

steps.name: Run provider-manager-routing challenge
steps.action: Execute CH-097 provider-manager-routing challenge via API
steps.expected: Challenge passes — detects providers map field despite Go struct alignment whitespace

steps.name: Verify all assertions pass
steps.action: Check all 9 assertions in challenge result
steps.expected: All assertions passed=true, including provider_map assertion

test_cases.expected_result: Challenge passes with regex-based whitespace-tolerant matching

fix_reference.description: provider-manager-routing challenge failed because string match did not tolerate Go struct field alignment whitespace

test_cases.name: EntityDetail jsdom/undici unhandled rejection

steps.name: Run EntityDetail test suite
steps.expected: All tests pass with zero unhandled rejections

steps.name: Check for InvalidArgumentError
steps.action: Verify no 'UND_ERR_INVALID_ARG' errors in test output
steps.expected: Zero InvalidArgumentError occurrences

test_cases.expected_result: EntityDetail tests pass without jsdom/undici compatibility errors

fix_reference.description: EntityDetail.test.tsx produces 174 InvalidArgumentError unhandled rejections from jsdom dispatcher

test_cases.name: Playback history UI on all four apps

steps.name: Android TV: verify ProgressBadge on home card
steps.action: Launch com.catalogizer.androidtv, navigate to first movie rail card with progress data
steps.expected: ProgressBadge visible at BottomStart of cover art showing duration, current, last session, play count

steps.name: Android TV: open HistoryDialog from detail screen
steps.action: DPAD_CENTER on focused card, navigate to History button in detail, DPAD_CENTER
steps.expected: Reproduction History dialog opens with 5-row summary + session list

steps.name: Android phone: verify ProgressBadge on MediaCard
steps.expected: ProgressBadge overlay rendered on cards with playback data

steps.name: Android phone: long-press card opens history
steps.action: Long-press any media card on home screen
steps.expected: HistoryDialog (Material 3 AlertDialog) opens with summary + sessions

steps.name: Web: verify ProgressBadge overlay
steps.action: Open catalog-web, navigate to any grid page using MediaGrid
steps.expected: ProgressBadge visible at bottom of each cover, data-testid=progress-badge-{id}

steps.name: Web: click badge opens HistoryDrawer
steps.expected: HistoryDrawer modal opens, shows summary rows + sessions, ESC closes

steps.name: Desktop: verify ProgressBadge on HomePage
steps.expected: ProgressBadge visible on cards in Continue Watching / Recent / Highly Rated sections

steps.name: Desktop: click badge opens HistoryDrawer
steps.expected: HistoryDrawer modal opens with summary + sessions, click outside closes

test_cases.expected_result: ProgressBadge renders on all four apps with matching strings; HistoryDialog/HistoryDrawer opens and shows real session data

fix_reference.description: Playback history tracked by backend + TV PlaybackTracker but no user-visible UI existed on any app

test_cases.name: Android TV search IME input accumulation

steps.name: Open search screen
steps.expected: Search field focused

steps.name: Type first query via DPAD_CENTER then text
steps.action: DPAD_CENTER to open IME, then `input text matrix`
steps.expected: Field shows 'matrix' exactly, no leading garbage

steps.name: Clear and type second query
steps.expected: Field shows 'die hard' exactly, no accumulated text from first query

steps.name: Submit second query
steps.expected: Results grid loads matching 'die hard'

test_cases.expected_result: Each query replaces the previous one cleanly; DPAD_CENTER open/submit flow works

fix_reference.description: Text from prior search accumulated because DPAD_CENTER did not open IME before input text

test_cases.name: Android TV auth token persisted across relaunch

steps.name: Log in fresh
steps.action: Launch app, log in with admin/admin123 via form
steps.expected: Home screen loads with library items

steps.name: Force-stop app
steps.expected: Process killed

steps.name: Cold-start without intent extras
steps.expected: App lands directly on home screen without showing login

steps.name: Verify library content
steps.expected: 174+ items visible, no 'Sign In' text in UI dump

test_cases.expected_result: JWT is persisted via TokenStore / EncryptedSharedPreferences and rehydrated on cold start

fix_reference.description: JWT was not written to EncryptedSharedPreferences so relaunch lost authenticated state
